author: claude
content: Functional verdict: RUNS-WITH-CAVEATS. Built throwaway env (py3.14, sqlalchemy 2.0.51, psycopg3, pytest-postgresql + conda postgresql 18.4). Ran test/storage/test_sqlalchemy_provider.py: 6 passed / 1 failed. The PostgreSQL scenario (test_all_tables_access_postgresql) PASSED end-to-end against an ephemeral PG, and an independent write+read-back smoke confirmed data round-trips. SQLAlchemy SQLite path also passes. Sole failure = test_schema_equivalence: real schema drift — branch's sqlalchemy_schema.py dns_responses is missing the 'error TEXT' column that v0.35.0's schema.sql gained (DNS error-handling work). Code-broken (one-line fix), not env-blocked. Needs: add error column to SA schema; for distributed crawl, an external/managed Postgres DSN (pytest-postgresql is test-only ephemeral).
